name: Andrew Gillum
subject: We're going to fight back
body:
Join our fight for affordable healthcare
#
Friends -
Earlier today, the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office released estimates on the Republican healthcare plan, and they are devastating. If it passes, an estimated 14 million Americans will lose their insurance coverage by 2018 (24 million by 2026), and insurance costs for seniors will skyrocket. Here's what Speaker Paul Ryan had to say about it:
_" The one thing I'm certain will happen is CBO will say, 'Well, gosh, not as many people will get coverage.'"_
And that's something I find insulting, both as someone who grew up in a working-class family and as someone with at least an ounce of human decency. Because people's lives are at stake. This is so much more than "not as many people" getting coverage. **This is a direct assault on the most vulnerable among us, against our seniors, and against the working and middle class families of America.**
There is no defense for the Republicans involved in crafting this plan, nor those who stood by and allowed this to happen. In our home state of Florida, known for our high population of seniors, it is outrageous that Governor Rick Scott supports those who wrote this plan.
Right now, we aren't sure whether this healthcare plan will pass. So we're focusing on figuring out what we can do to stop it from passing. I can tell you this: when I'm Governor, I will fight every day to make quality, affordable healthcare coverage available to all Floridians.
[**If you 'd like to join us in making this commitment, you can do so by adding your name here.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb33cb/9e00690/49615fa4/24035cca/2467570955/VEsH/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/healthcare")
Together, we will fight for our right to healthcare. And together, we will win.
Bring it home,
Andrew

body:

Peter,

Today we're kicking off our final Membership Week -- your last chance to become an official 2017 EMILY's List member this year! We're closing out the list and shipping our final batch of membership cards, but before we do I want to make sure you get yours, Peter.

When you donate $3 and get your official membership card, you're directly helping elect pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot across all 50 states who will _always_ fight for reproductive rights.

This year is already off to a busy start -- we've endorsed nine women running for the Senate, two for the House, and three for governor. Over 9,500 women have already contacted us about running for state and local office through our Run to Win program.

With Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans controlling both chambers of Congress, our work has truly never been more critical.

Leigh K. Warren

name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: Bernie's town hall
body:
We're in the fight of our lives to create good jobs and protect health care.
#
Sisters and Brothers,
MSNBC just finished airing Senator Bernie Sanders' long-awaited town hall in McDowell County, West Virginia with Chris Hayes only a few moments ago. We want everyone across America, in blue states, red states and the battlegrounds, to hear what the folks in McDowell County had to say.
Growing income inequality has devastated communities like McDowell County all across the nation. Jobs have vanished because of terrible trade deals -- and now their health care is at risk as Congressional Republicans try to dismantle the Affordable Care Act. As many as 24 million Americans could be uninsured by 2026 if the Republicans repeal Obamacare.
**We 're in the fight of our lives to create good jobs, protect Social Security, and ensure affordable health care is available to everyone. [Donate $3 today to support this critical organizing work happening in communities across the country.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a56/43f17890/dea6395c/62000590/2475191338/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-jobs?refcode=em170313-issues-full")**
Places like McDowell County have been neglected by the political establishment for generations. They're suffering from crises like the opioid epidemic, shrinking life expectancies, and even having to choose between food and utility bills. Millions of our fellow Americans are living this reality every day, but their stories are too often shut out from cable news.
We want to change that, because the only way that we can end poverty, fix health care and improve the quality of life for all Americans is to transform our political system so it works for everyone. It won't always be easy. But people like you are joining with Our Revolution in local communities across the country to stand together and protect our communities from unprecedented power grab by Wall Street and the Washington elite.
**We 're organizing across towns and communities just like McDowell County, fighting to make sure that Washington puts working families ahead of special interests. [Pitch in $3 right now to help Our Revolution in our grassroots effort to protect jobs, health care, Social Security and other issues vital to working families](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a56/43f17890/dea6395c/62000590/2475191338/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-jobs?refcode=em170313-issues-full").**
Let's go forward together to bring about the change we need.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
Everything White House for 3/14/2017. |

**WHITE HOUSE MEMO:**
President Donald J. Trump is committed to delivering relief to Americans struggling under the weight of Obamacare's rising prices and onerous mandates. The President's reforms will bring down costs and increase access to coverage for millions of Americans. It's time to repeal the disaster known as Obamacare and replace it with a system that puts the interests of the people first.

**GET INVOLVED**
* President Trump wants to know how Obamacare is affecting hard-working Americans.
[Share Your Obamacare Disaster Story With President Trump](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9ff33e204d5f50202968ee719dd64e4a5387121b902e374a0cd9c96759bc00630b93625ce62260f61ce4ede544cf842224f253c68c676243)

"http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+independent+investigation+into+Trumps+ti&utm_campaign=em_20170314_tp_nd&source=em_20170314_tp_nd")** so we can get to the truth about Russian meddling in our elections, and they want Trump to **[release his tax returns](http://my.democrats. name: Glenn Davis
subject: We Are On The Ballot!
body:
Glenn Davis for Lt. Governor

Tue

Tuesday, March 14,
2017

Peter,

Due to the hard work of my supporters
all over Virginia, I'm proud to announce that I have qualified to
be on the June 13th Republican Primary ballot for Virginia's next
Lt. Governor.

Collecting almost 13,000 petition
signatures to get on the ballot was only the first step in the
long journey towards victory.

The next step is ensuring that my
campaign has the financial resources to spread our message across
the Commonwealth. If we want to win in November, we need
candidates with the experience that matches their talking points.
Otherwise, it's just more worthless rhetoric.

I'm the only entrepreneur in this race,
I'm the only legislator that has a history of fighting for tax
and regulatory reform to ease the burdens on small businesses,
and I'm the only candidate with a plan to make Virginia #1 again
for business and job growth!

I hope you will consider donating to
help spread our message. Together, let's make Virginia #1 again!

- Glenn R. Davis

P.S. - It is exciting to be able to
report that I'm on the ballot, but the work has just begun. Your
support and donations are needed now more than ever. Would you
please consider donating?

Authorized by Davis for LG

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 17, 2017.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJyilCgmFN

body:
Ever since the Republicans released their plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act, my team and I have pored over the bill to investigate its potential impact. Ever since the Republicans released their plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act, my team and I have pored over the bill to investigate its potential impact.
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3a2/2b07114c/5b8a7299/736be2da/910857146/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=PT-20170314-Nielsen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")
Hi, Friend -- I'm Stephanie, the Research Director here at the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee.

Ever since the Republicans released their plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act, my team and I have pored over the bill to investigate its potential impact.

Then, yesterday afternoon, the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office released a stunning report proving:

* 24 million people will lose insurance, including a whopping 14 million by next year
* Insurers can substantially raise premiums on older enrollees, charging them up to five times more
* Defunding Planned Parenthood will shutter services nationwide that help women make their own health choices

We already knew Americans would lose coverage and pay more for less care while the wealthy haul in billions through tax breaks. Yet the CBO's outcome is more dangerous than we imagined.

**[We absolutely cannot let this bill pass. Join us to oppose the repeal of the Affordable Care Act.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3a2/2b07114c/5b8a7299/736be2da/910857146/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=PT-20170314-Nielsen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

Widespread criticism has accumulated from doctors, hospitals, and groups like the AARP and American Medical Association as more facts become clear about the GOP health plan.

It's no wonder why the Republicans raced this disastrous repeal bill out of two House committees before the Congressional Budget Office had a chance to expose its consequences.

But now, Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and Paul Ryan have to sell throwing 24 million Americans off of health insurance, raising premiums for older Americans, while giving $275 billion in tax breaks to the richest Americans.

Let's show them we're not buying it.

**Speak out against the GOP's health care bill right now and get your opposition on the record:**

**[http://dscc.org/fight-back-trumpcare](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3a2/2b07114c/5b8a7299/736be2da/910857146/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trumpcare?source=PT-20170314-Nielsen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

Thanks,

Stephanie Nielsen
DSCC Research Director

**A quick note on donations, friend:**

The fight ahead on health care is going to be a tough one. Already, the GOP is targeting multiple Senate Democrats with aggressive TV ad campaigns to support this sham of a health care replacement. 99% of our contributions come from donors giving $200 or less, so when we say we're depending on grassroots donors, we mean it. We don't have the Koch brothers in our corner, but we do have you. We hope you'll pitch today to help Senate Democrats in the fights ahead.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170314-Nielsen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3a2/2b07114c/5b8a7299/736be2d4/910857146/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3a2/2b07114c/5b8a7299/736be2d7/910857146/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3a2/2b07114c/5b8a7299/736be2d6/910857146/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Jay Inslee
subject: We need Manka in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Manka
body:
Join me in supporting Manka Dhingra for Senate.

Dear Friend,

I'll always be the first to say that state governments affect real change.

And, now more than ever, it's incredibly important that we ensure our state government
will fight for every Washingtonian. We need to make sure that our Washington values are protected every step of the way. We need strong, progressive leaders who will work for us.

That's why I'm endorsing Manka Dhingra for the 45th Legislative District Senate seat. Manka has repeatedly shown that she never gives up when it comes to protecting Washingtonians' rights. Her experience and success protecting safety and rights at the King County Prosecuting Attorney's Office and her dedication in the community standing up for women and families makes it clear to me that she is the right woman for the job. I urge you to join me in standing with her!

Join me in supporting Manka Dhingra for the 45th Legislative District Senate seat!

http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA2MTg0NTQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTEyMTExOTk5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0

Manka Dhingra has worked throughout her career to improve the lives of people with mental illness,
protect women from domestic violence, and stand up for immigrant rights. I have no doubt that she is
someone we can rely on to protect those values in the 45th District.

The fights we've taken on during the 2017 Legislative Session are proof we need Democrats like Manka
in the Senate. Democrats are just one seat away from taking back the Senate. It's critical to win if we
want to push forward the agenda I set forth during my second inaugural address.

I hope you'll join me in supporting her.

Sign on to endorse Manka Dhingra for the 45th Legislative District Senate seat today.

http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTA2MTg0NTQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTEyMTExOTk5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0

Thank you for doing your part.

Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

SIGN ON: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTA2MTg0NTQS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTEyMTExOTk5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0

Friend -- Paul Ryan and the GOP released their plan to replace Obamacare last week, and it could be a DISASTER if signed into law.

How bad is "Trumpcare"? It would:

-Force Americans to pay more for less coverage
-Kick up to 24 MILLION Americans off of their healthcare plan by 2026
-And defund Planned Parenthood.

Listen, we can't stand by. We need to fight this bill tooth and nail so it NEVER becomes law and 24 MILLION American's don't lose access to the quality affordable health insurance. **[That's why we need you to sign on to our petition immediately to tell the GOP "NO!" on Trumpcare!](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b224/1a5213b3/76da5d90/718bae25/3917764703/VEsH/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/denounce-trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+need+you+to+sign+on+to&utm_campaign=em031417_1_s1&source=em031417_1_s1")** [I STAND AGAINST TRUMPCARE](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b224/1a5213b3/76da5d90/718bae24/3917764703/VEsE/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/denounce-trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+I+STAND+AGAINST+TRUMPCARE&utm_campaign=em031417_1_s1&source=em031417_1_s1") Groups from both sides of the aisle agree: this bill would do NOTHING to help average Americans. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: truth is uncovered:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Friend,

It's becoming clearer by the day that the Trump/Ryan plan to repeal and replace the Affordable Care Act is a reckless and dangerous path for America. Yesterday, the Congressional Budget Office (CBO) announced that if this bill succeeds 14 million Americans will lose health coverage by next year alone ― and 24 million will lose coverage by 2026.

This report proves that Donald Trump's claim that under his new plan "everybody is going to be taken care of much better than they are now" was just more hollow rhetoric. Americans will not just lose coverage under Trumpcare, prices will skyrocket and the U.S. deficit will grow as billionaires, millionaires and insurance companies get $600 billion in tax breaks. It's no wonder the House Republican leadership is trying to ram this destructive bill through Congress before the American public even has the chance to learn the details.

[**Let me be clear: My Democratic colleagues and I will do everything we can to protect health care in our country. But we need your help―add your name now to show you oppose Trumpcare >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b0d/70cdc2ba/474b7d77/397e290/754941313/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/noAHCA?code=vanhollen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fsigncvh%3Frefcode%3Dem031417%26amount%3D15.00%26recurring%3D12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Let+me+be+clear+My+Democratic+colleagues&utm_campaign=em031417&source=em031417")

The numbers don't lie:

2018 -> 14 million uninsured
2020 -> 21 million uninsured
2026 -> 24 million uninsured
The Trump team, Paul Ryan and the Senate GOP are working overtime to try to discredit the nonpartisan, independent CBO report that reveals the truth. But Americans in both red states and blue states know that this is not a plan with their best interests in mind. Trumpcare will eliminate health care for millions of hard working people while giving the wealthiest households and insurance companies a HUGE tax break.

[**Enough is enough. The Republicans ' crusade to benefit wealthy donors and CEO's while eliminating health care for millions must end. Add your name to send a clear message and join my Democratic colleagues and I in saying NO to Trumpcare >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b0d/70cdc2ba/474b7d77/397e291/754941313/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/noAHCA?code=vanhollen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fsigncvh%3Frefcode%3Dem031417%26amount%3D15.00%26recurring%3D12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Enough+is+enough+The+Republicansrsquo+cr&utm_campaign=em031417&source=em031417")

Thank you,

Chris
